div.h2: CLOCK_MONOTONIC vs CLOCK_REALTIME — Why the Wrong Clock Breaks Profiling

g.text: Observer Effect: What elapsed_ns Actually Measures
Total: 16 bytes — SUBJECT TO NTP JUMPS
0x00 | time_t | tv_sec // seconds since boot (never jumps)
Total: 16 bytes — GUARANTEED MONOTONE, vDSO fast path ~5ns
Timeline Breakdown — one syscall under ptrace
T0 | tracee executes syscall instr | entry stop fires
T3 | kernel executes syscall | actual work
T4 | syscall done, exit stop fires | ctx-switch to tracer
call_count | EXACT | one increment per exit stop
relative pct | VALID | ratios cancel out overhead
long IO waits | VALID | 500ms read >> 10us overhead
abs ns values | INVALID | includes 2x ctx-switch cost
